info.title: DotAuth Tool
info.description: DotAuth tool lets you get access tokens from your command line.

options.name: --response-mode
options.description: Sets the client id for the login request (optional). [default: query]

options.name: --scopes
options.description: Sets the scopes to request token for (optional). Default is `openid`. [default: System.Collections.ObjectModel.ReadOnlyCollection`1[System.Reflection.CustomAttributeTypedArgument]]

commands.name: configure
commands.description: Configures the tool with the provided values as defaults for later use.

options.name: --client-id
options.description: Sets the client id for the tool client (required).

options.name: --client-secret
options.description: Sets the client secret for the tool client (required).

options.name: --authority
options.description: Sets the issuing authority for the tool (required).

options.name: --redirect-url
options.description: Sets the redirect url for the authentication flow (optional). Default value is `http://localhost:65001/signin` [default: http://localhost:65001/signin]

options.name: --code-challenge-method
options.description: Sets the code challenge method (optional). Default value is S256 [default: S256]
